title: Forge CI containment freeze
summary: Forge CI is degraded or failing; agents must not re-enable CI lanes, routines, or release automation until the situation moves to recovery.

phases.label: Detection
phases.summary: CI failures were detected and scoped to the Forge path.

phases.label: Containment
phases.summary: Keep routines and automation from re-enabling Forge CI while the failure mode is being isolated.

phases.label: Recovery
phases.summary: Re-enable CI and affected routines only after explicit clearance and a green required lane.

preflight_message: Forge CI containment is active. Do not re-enable CI, routines, or release automation without Tom clearing this Situation.
